headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Weyerhaeuser, Rayonier and Worthington Enterprises
summary: WY, RYN and WOR navigate a tough wood market as housing weakness and tariffs weigh, but cost controls, innovation, and infrastructure demand offer support.
